title: Opinion: Opinion | The Beijing Visit: Why Does Trump Suddenly Need Xi Jinping?
summary_full: China will factor in the real possibility that in the mid-term elections in November, Trump may lose the House of Representatives and may become a lame-duck president. How far should it invest in an agreement with Trump is the question.
